caption: A news broadcast features a series of frames with a red and yellow graphic theme. The primary focus is on Nitish Kumar, a man wearing a white Nehru jacket, speaking while gesturing with his hands. He is surrounded by other men, including one in a light-colored shirt and another in a dark shirt. The screen displays various text overlays in Hindi, including "मुख्यमंत्री नीतीश कुमार" and "मंत्री." The top banner consistently reads "कांग्रेस छटपटई, तेजस्वी की 'पिक्चर' बाकी है." A "BREAKING NEWS" ticker runs across the bottom, alongside a digital clock showing "10:09 PM" and a channel logo. In the initial scene, the footage is partially obscured by a white transition effect over an image of a man in a white shirt near a vehicle and an Indian flag. As the sequence progresses, the image clears to show a close-up of Nitish Kumar speaking to the camera.
